message:
fix(audit): 5 bugs from deep code audit (bd-3n0,bd-30r,bd-3ge,bd-15l,bd-170)

- bd-3n0: Fix replenish tautology — compare available_count() against
  config().file_count, not inventory().len() (which was always equal)
- bd-30r: Add set_pressure_thresholds() to PID controller and wire into
  SIGHUP config reload so all 4 levels update, not just target_free_pct
- bd-3ge: Use DAEMON_STATE_STALE_THRESHOLD_SECS (90) instead of hardcoded
  60 in state.json staleness check to avoid spurious warnings
- bd-15l: Break daemon main loop when scanner/executor exceed respawn limit
  instead of continuing in degraded state
- bd-170: Replace 5 LinuxPlatform::new() calls with detect_platform() in
  CLI for consistent platform detection

Includes regression tests for bd-3n0 and bd-30r.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
